title: pmxhelpr 0.5.0
text: release simplifies plotting function interfaces, harmonizes naming across package, replaces flat theme list system theme element constructor, introduces class-tagged stats containers (vpc_stats, doseprop_stats) can tabulated re-plotted recomputation. VPC pipeline rewritten without vpc package dependency comprehensive BLQ handling standard prediction- corrected VPCs continuous data range new function VPC plots proportion data BLQ time.

title: pmxhelpr 0.5.0
text: plot_dvtime_dual() removed — compose PK PD panels plot_dvtime() + patchwork::wrap_plots(). df_addn() removed — replaced var_addn(). df_pcdv() removed — replaced var_predcorr(). df_nobsbin() removed — bin counting now integrated df_vpcstats(). mod_loglog() df_loglog() removed — log-log regression performed inside df_doseprop(). dvconc_caption() dvtime_caption() longer exported.

title: pmxhelpr 0.5.0
text: df_addpred() renamed df_mrgsim_addpred(). plot_popgof() / plot_popgof_theme() renamed plot_gof() / plot_gof_theme(). plot_vpc_exactbins() renamed plot_vpc_cont() (arguments revised — see “Removed renamed arguments”). plot_vpclegend() renamed plot_vpc_legend(). breaks_time() now internal helper (var_timebreaks()).

title: pmxhelpr 0.5.0
text: df_doseprop() plot_doseprop(): metric_var renamed metric_name_var, exp_var renamed metric_value_var, make role column explicit (.e., exposure metric label variable vs exposure metric value variable). df_mrgsim_replicate(): named-vector arguments num_vars char_vars removed; pass extra simulation columns ... mrgsolve::mrgsim_df() via carry_out (numeric) recover (type useful character / factor). plot_dvconc(), plot_dvtime(), plot_gof(): cfb (logical) / cfb_base (numeric) argument pair replaced single numeric ref argument (NULL = line). example, cfb = TRUE, cfb_base = 0 becomes ref = 0. plot_gof(): output_colors removed — overlay colors DV, PRED, IPRED now set via pmx_color() plot_gof_theme(). plot_vpc_legend(): update renamed theme, aligning theme-argument convention used plot functions. plot functions: x_breaks, x_scale, x_lab, y_lab removed — add equivalent ggplot2 layers returned plot object.

title: pmxhelpr 0.5.0
text: VPC pipeline rewritten without vpc package dependency. df_vpcstats() summary column names follow <role>_<low|med|hi> scheme — simulated quantiles sim_low_*, sim_med_*, sim_hi_*; observed quantiles obs_low/med/hi; per-bin counts obs_n obs_n_blq (previously nbin / nobsblq); BLQ proportions (std-VPC ) sim_prop_blq_*. min_bin_count filter now gates quantifiable observations (obs_n - obs_n_blq) VPCs total observations (obs_n) cens-VPCs. Comprehensive BLQ handling includes censoring observed quantiles without censoring simulated data VPCs censoring observed simulated data LLOQ quantile aggregation pcVPCs. plot_vpc_legend(ci) default changes c(0.05, 0.95) (vector) 0.90 (scalar). lloq now accepts vector renders one legend entry per unique value. vpc removed Imports (VPC pipeline longer depends ). patchwork moves Imports Suggests — install explicitly compose multi-panel layouts (e.g. legend + VPC pattern README). var_addn() now derives factor levels order first appearance grp_var, pre-sorted input like c(10, 200, 1000) yields levels numeric order rather alphabetic order returned factor(). Removes need follow forcats::fct_relevel() numeric dose / time groupings. plot_build_vpc(loq = …) supplied explicitly always wins compute_out$config$loq draws one global reference line per unique value. Per-facet (strat_var × LLOQ) dispatch reserved inherited case.

title: pmxhelpr 0.5.0
text: plot_vpc_cont() generates 1-step (plot vpc_stats) 2-step (calculate plot) VPC continuous portion data range, wrapping df_vpcstats plot_build_vpc(). plot_vpc_cens() generates 1-step (plot vpc_stats) 2-step (calculate plot) VPC censored portion data range, wrapping df_vpcstats plot_build_vpc(). df_vpcstats() computes VPC summary statistics raw replicate simulation output returns vpc_stats / pmx_stats container. Always emits standard prediction-corrected statistics object supports toggling pcvpc plotting. plot_build_vpc() renders VPC ggplot vpc_stats container. Use directly working manually-constructed cached vpc_stats object; users still go plot_vpc_cont() /plot_vpc_cens. plot_build_doseprop() renders dose-proportionality ggplot doseprop_stats container; users still go plot_doseprop(). plot_doseprop_theme() theme factory plot_doseprop() keys obs_point linear. plot_gof_shown() plot_vpc_shown() constructors GOF VPC layer-visibility settings. var_addn() generates factor labels unique-value counts, replacing df_addn(). var_dosenorm() performs dose normalization. var_predcorr() performs prediction correction, replacing df_pcdv().

title: pmxhelpr 0.5.0
text: df_mrgsim_replicate(parallel = FALSE) — TRUE, replicate simulations run via future.apply::future_lapply() using active future plan, per-replicate L’Ecuyer-CMRG RNG streams output stays reproducible fixed seed. Adds future.apply Suggests. df_vpcstats() plot_vpc_cont() gain mode = c("auto", "rank", "drop") controlling BLQ-encoded values flow quantile aggregation. "auto" (default) resolves "rank" std VPC "drop" pcVPC. df_vpcstats() plot_vpc_cont() accept per-row LLOQ (multi-cohort / mid-study assay-update datasets): observation censored row’s LLOQ, stratified plots draw one reference line per (strat × LLOQ) combination. Unique non-NA values exposed via config$loq. plot_dvtime() plot_gof(): loq_method accepts character aliases "none", "postdose", "" addition existing numeric values 0, 1, 2. legacy numeric form continues work. plot_dvtime() emits message loq inherited LLOQ column data, mirroring plot_vpc_cont(). Pass loq explicitly suppress. plot_gof(blq_mode = c("obs", "")) scopes BLQ imputation observed DV layer (default) observed model-predicted layers. Time, prediction, simulated-DV columns across functions now scalar NSE-friendly arguments (time_var, ntime_var, pred_var, ipred_var, sim_dv_var) instead named lists (time_vars, output_vars). Pass arguments bare names strings. plot_vpc_legend(type = c("cont", "cens")) selects label set layer set legend describes — "cens" relabels central-tendency entries "Obs Prop BLQ", "Sim Prop BLQ", "Sim <ci>% CI Prop BLQ" suppresses prediction-interval entries, matching plot_vpc_cens() plot.

title: pmxhelpr 0.5.0
text: plot_doseprop() accepts doseprop_stats container returned df_doseprop() directly. Pass precomputed result skip regression refit re-plot different theme se settings. Pipeline arguments (metrics, metric_name_var, metric_value_var, dose_var, method, ci, sigdigits) honored precomputed path error clear message. plot_vpc_cont() accepts vpc_stats container returned df_vpcstats() directly. Pass precomputed result re-plot different min_bin_count, shown, theme, pcvpc settings without re-summarizing. Pipeline arguments (strat_var, loq, mode, pi, ci, column-name args) honored precomputed path error clear message.

title: pmxhelpr 0.5.0
text: New pmx_theme() factory pmx_*() element constructors — pmx_point(), pmx_line(), pmx_ribbon(), pmx_errorbar(), pmx_trend() — replace previous flat list role- geometry-based theme elements. Theme factory keys follow layer_element convention (e.g. obs_point, cent_errorbar, ref_line, loq_line). VPC keys follow element_statistic convention aligned shown argument (e.g. obs_median_line, sim_pi_ci). New pmx_color() constructor sets overlay colors DV, PRED, IPRED plot_gof_theme() — e.g. plot_gof_theme(cent_color = pmx_color(pred = "purple")). New pmx_style() convenience constructor applies shared aesthetics (color, alpha) point line elements role — e.g. plot_dvtime_theme(obs = pmx_style(alpha = 0.3)). +.pmx_theme() +.pmx_element() methods compose partial themes; pmx_style() shortcuts applied first explicit element-level overrides win.

title: pmxhelpr 0.5.0
text: pmx_stats shared container vpc_stats doseprop_stats subclasses — slots $stats, $obs, $config — returned df_vpcstats() df_doseprop(). print(), summary(), .data.frame() methods pmx_stats give focused REPL view (dimensions, slot row counts, run-config keys) plain data.frame view $stats. Subclasses override print() / summary() richer output (column groups VPC; one-line-per-metric PowerCI + interpretation doseprop). print() methods pmx_theme pmx_element objects render banner + per-field listing instead default class-attribute dump. pmx_vpc_plot ggplot subclass warns facet_*() layers added externally, pointing users strat_var argument instead. Predicates is_doseprop_stats(), is_pmx_element(), is_pmx_stats(), is_pmx_theme(), is_pmx_vpc_plot(), is_vpc_stats() exported. strict = TRUE, stats theme predicates run corresponding structural validator.

title: pmxhelpr 0.5.0
text: New Getting Started vignette ships package new-user onboarding. New Dose-Proportionality Workflow vignette covers df_doseprop() → plot_build_doseprop() → plot_doseprop(), doseprop_stats / pmx_stats class system, precomputed-stats path. VPC, GOF, exploratory PK / PK-PD, plot-themes vignettes restructured focused articles cross-links. Plot Themes Aesthetics article covers inspecting pmx_element / pmx_theme objects composing partial themes +. Visual Predictive Check Workflow article covers df_vpcstats(), plot_vpc_cens(), pipeline column contracts (df_mrgsim_replicate() → df_vpcstats() → plot_build_vpc()), inspection vpc_stats objects. Narrative vignettes hosted pkgdown site (https://ryancrass.github.io/pmxhelpr/articles/); installed package longer ships built vignettes inst/doc/, keeping install footprint small.

title: pmxhelpr 0.5.0
text: exported functions take column-name arguments accept bare names strings via shared NSE-resolution helper. Plot functions warn input dataset one unique compartment EVID == 0 filter, avoiding silently plotting observations unintended compartment. df_mrgsim_replicate() errors user-supplied carry_out / recover values overlap wrapped baseline columns, instead silently shadowing . Line-geom aesthetics use linewidth instead deprecated size throughout. df_vpcstats(pcvpc = TRUE) now drops MDV == 1 records simulated data loq = NULL input dataset LLOQ column, mirroring observed-data path. Previous behavior caused minor quantile drift bins NA observations. Test coverage expanded ~100 800+ tests.
